summary: Live Event page changes tested successfully. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key UI elements and flows verified - Add button adds school to EVENT only (not pipeline), Note field is REQUIRED (buttons disabled when empty), Log to Pod and Send to Athlete buttons work correctly, signals are saved with proper flags (action_created, school_added, upgrade_needed).
critical_code_review_comments: EventSignalCreate model in models.py correctly has note_text: str (required) and send_to_athlete: bool = False
POST /api/events/{event_id}/signals correctly handles send_to_athlete flag: False=Log to Pod, True=Send to Athlete
When send_to_athlete=False, action is created but assigned_to_athlete=False
When send_to_athlete=True and school not in pipeline, enforce_school_limit() is called before adding to pipeline
If at plan limit, upgrade_needed=true is returned and notification is created via create_notification()
POST /api/events/{event_id}/add-school correctly adds school to event.school_ids only, NOT to athlete pipeline
Frontend LiveEvent.js disables buttons when noteText.trim() is empty (line 481-482)
Frontend has two buttons: 'LOG TO POD' with send_to_athlete=false and 'SEND TO ATHLETE' with send_to_athlete=true
All data-testid attributes present: athlete-chips, school-chips, add-school-btn, add-school-form, add-school-input, note-text, log-to-pod-btn, send-to-athlete-btn, signal-{type}, interest-{level}
seed_data_creation: Used existing event_1 (College Exposure Camp) with athletes athlete_2, athlete_4, athlete_3. Test signals created with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Event page changes fully tested. Key changes: 1) Add button (+ Add) adds school to EVENT's school_ids list only - no pipeline entry created. 2) Note field is REQUIRED - buttons are disabled when empty. 3) Two log buttons: 'LOG TO POD' (send_to_athlete=false) saves signal and creates pod action NOT assigned to athlete. 'SEND TO ATHLETE' (send_to_athlete=true) saves signal, creates pod action assigned to athlete, and adds school to pipeline if not already there (subject to plan limit). 4) Plan limit enforcement: if athlete at limit, signal is saved but school NOT added to pipeline, upgrade_needed=true returned. 5) Notification created when upgrade_needed. Response includes flags: pipeline_updated, action_created, school_added, upgrade_needed. Test file: test_live_event_changes.py covers all these scenarios.

verified_requirements.add_button_adds_to_event_only: PASS - POST /api/events/{id}/add-school adds to event.school_ids, NOT pipeline
verified_requirements.note_field_required: PASS - Model has note_text: str (required), frontend disables buttons when empty
verified_requirements.log_to_pod_not_assigned_to_athlete: PASS - send_to_athlete=False creates action with assigned_to_athlete=False
verified_requirements.send_to_athlete_assigned_to_athlete: PASS - send_to_athlete=True creates action with assigned_to_athlete=True
verified_requirements.send_to_athlete_adds_school_to_pipeline: PASS - Adds school to pipeline via programs collection if not already there
verified_requirements.plan_limit_enforcement: PASS - enforce_school_limit() checks plan, returns upgrade_needed=true if at limit
